Internal Deal Memo: Project Sapphire

To: Executive Team  
From: Dr. Emily Tan, Head of Strategic Acquisitions  
Date: October 15, 2023  

We are in the advanced stages of negotiating the acquisition of Orion Tech Solutions under the codename Project Sapphire. The proposed acquisition price is SGD 150 million. Mr. David Lim (NRIC: S8765432B) has been appointed as the lead negotiator. The target company's UEN is 198765432H, and they have shown favorable metrics in our due diligence process. Their primary contact is Ms. Clara Ng, reachable at +65 6123 4567.

For queries, please contact me directly at emily.tan@corporateventures.sg. Further discussions will be scheduled next week to finalize the terms and prepare the necessary documentation.

Best regards,  
Dr. Emily Tan
